zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Neville於1330年出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，她的父親Ralph Neville39歲，母親Alice de Audley31歲。她與William Dacre結婚。她去世於1361年9月1日在英國波藍德萊納爾可斯特享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Neville于1330年出生在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素时，她的父亲Ralph Neville39岁，母亲Alice de Audley31岁。她与William Dacre结婚。她去世于1361年9月1日在英国波藍德萊納爾可斯特享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Neville was born in 1330, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, her father, Ralph Neville, was 39 and her mother, Alice de Audley, was 31. She married William Dacre. She died on 1 September 1361, in Lanercost, Cumberland, England, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Neville est née en 1330, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice de Audley, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Dacre. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1361, à Lanercost, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Neville 1330 in Raby Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Neville 39 und ihre Mutter Alice de Audley 31. Sie hat William Dacre geheiratet. Sie starb am 1. September 1361 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Lanercost, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Neville è nata il nel 1330 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, sua padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Alice de Audley, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William Dacre. Morì il 1 settembre 1361, nel Lanercost, Cumberland, England, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Nevilleが1330年にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは39歳，母Alice de Audleyは31歳であった。William Dacreと結婚した。彼女は1361年9月1日にイギリスクウンバーランドランエルコストで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Neville(이)가 1330년 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Audley(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 William Dacre(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1361년 9월 1일 영국 쿠벌랜드 랜르코스트에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Neville nasceu em 1330, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Audley, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William Dacre. Ela faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1361, em Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Neville родилась в 1330 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Audley, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Dacre. Она умерла 1 сентября 1361 г. в местности ланиркост, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Neville nació en 1330, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice de Audley, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William Dacre. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1361, en Lanercost, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años.
